summary: All three requirements have been implemented. The diff introduces comprehensive barcode positioning and validation logic to prevent overlap and clipping, adjusts CPCL generation with proper spacing calculations, and includes diagnostic utilities to ensure barcode visibility within the 58mm × 43mm label boundaries.

hallucinated_features.description: Barcode diagnostics and validation logging system (cpclBarcodeDiagnostics.ts)
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest did not ask for a diagnostic logging system with structured metadata, reasonCode tracking, or validation warnings. It only requested fixing the layout to prevent overlap and ensure visibility.
The BuildRequest constraints explicitly stated 'Non-goals: Modifying printer communication protocol' and did not request test print functionality.

While the constraint mentions 'Keep calibration offset functionality intact', the BuildRequest did not ask for new calibration pattern generation. The constraint was about preserving existing calibration, not adding new calibration features.

hallucinated_features.description: Barcode settings validation utility with comprehensive checks
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest did not ask for a separate validation utility that checks scale, height, overlap, and boundary constraints. It requested fixing the layout logic itself, not adding pre-flight validation.
